title: Eren's Utilities
description: Eren's Utilities is a collection of small tweaks to enhance the Vanilla experience.
body:
### Eren's Utilities is a collection of small tweaks to enhance the Vanilla experience. The concept is to make an all-in-one solution for most needs in a performant way. Almost all of its features are configurable.
---
Features:
- Infinite trades: Villagers and merchants will offer unlimited trades.
- Totem Anywhere: Totem of Undying will be activated regardless of where it is in your inventory.
- Better Bamboo: Optimizes bamboo recipes to make them behave more like classic types of wood. You can now get more planks and sticks from blocks of bamboo and smelt them to get charcoal.
- Fence Jumper: Allows players to jump over fences and walls.
- Right-click harvesting: Allows players to right-click to harvest crops and plants. Allows AOE harvesting with tools based on configuration.
- Paint Brush: Allows players to cycle between available paintings. Supports _Fast Paintings_ mod!
- Configurable Cactus and Sugar Cane Limit: These blocks can now go beyond 3 block height and it's configurable! (Default: 64)
---
Planned:
- Material Sink: A building block to turn excess materials (cobblestone and such) into valuable items at a low chance.
- Farming tools: Items to help with farming such as a watering can that increases growth and scythe for AOE harvesting and replanting.
- Inventory stuff: QoL changes like making tools not useable at low durability, sorting with configurable key, etc...
- Item pipes: Filterable and upgradeable pipes. Not many options for 1.21.1 Fabric. Might look into other types of pipes in the future but right now it's mostly focused on Vanilla stuff.
- Wiki and Issue Tracker
---
### Requires [https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib).

**Note:** This mod is still in progress and it will have many more features available to enhance your game. Currently, 1.21.1 Fabric is the only planned version.
